title: The role of marketing and its relationship with other business activities
summary: 9609 AS marketing role — customer focus and links to finance, operations, and HRM.
learningObjectives: Define marketing and its role in business.
Explain customer orientation vs product orientation.
Describe links with other functional areas.

simpleExplanation.title: Meeting customer needs profitably
simpleExplanation.summary: Marketing identifies and satisfies customer needs while coordinating with other departments to deliver value.
steps: Finance budgets campaigns; ops delivers quality.

sections.content: **Marketing role** (3.1.1) opens **Topic 3**. Show **cross-functional links** in every essay paragraph.
